    ensures

{
}
reason: `PTMem::view` is `external_body` — the mapping from raw page table memory to PTE map is completely opaque, so identical memories could theoretically produce different PTE views

name: can_flip_polarity_commented_out_conditions
code:
proof fn phi_4_can_flip_polarity_commented_out_conditions(pre: State, c: Constants)
    requires
        pre.writes.tso === set![],
        pre.writes.nonpos === set![],
        !pre.hist.pending_maps.is_empty(),
    ensures
        pre.can_flip_polarity(c),
{
}
reason: `can_flip_polarity` has commented-out conditions for `pending_maps` and `pending_unmaps` — polarity can flip even with outstanding pending maps/unmaps, potentially allowing unsafe interleaving of mapping and unmapping operations

name: writer_sbuf_empty_after_core_change
reason: When a different core writes, the precondition `!tso.is_empty() ==> core == writes.core` combined with `writer_sbuf_subset_tso_writes` forces the old writer's sbuf to be empty — tests that the invariant correctly prevents concurrent writers
